error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the ERP server. Check that the host is reachable from Home Assistant (firewall, network, VPN).
error.timeout: The ERP server did not respond in time. It may be overloaded or unreachable.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. The API key (JWT) was rejected by the ERP server.
error.invalid_host: The host URL is invalid or the hostname could not be resolved. Check for typos.
error.ssl_error: TLS/SSL error while connecting. The certificate may be invalid, expired, or self-signed.
error.server_error: The ERP server returned an internal error (5xx). Try again later or check the server logs.
error.not_found: The expected API endpoint was not found (404). Check the host URL and that the ERP version supports the Home Assistant integration.
error.invalid_response: The ERP server returned an unexpected response format.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. See the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.already_configured: This ERP instance is already configured.
